description: Abyssal Depths Patch 3 (11 August 2025) — Season 26 Winner Statues, Depths Changes, Vanity Merchant Changes, Mob Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (see separate thread), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season 26 Winner Statues Unveiled
sections.description: Statues unveiled in each server's Conqueror's Hall for IFures, Peony Flower, and Heralds of Valhalla.
sections.searchable_text: Season 26 Winner Statues IFures Peony Flower Heralds of Valhalla Conquerors Hall

sections.heading: Changes
items: Depths: Duration of each level reduced by 3 minutes; players now display a ghostly animation upon death; time between entering and being allowed to reenter has been reduced

Vanity Merchant tabs reorganized to match Appearance UI; Victory Emote prices doubled but grant 5x charges; Adventurer Tokens can no longer be crafted (can be salvaged for 100 Community Tokens); Adventurer's Challenge Avatars and Avatar Rings can now be crafted with Community Tokens
Damage dealt by bosses and minibosses in Hunter Corrupted Dungeons has been reduced
Number of tracks in Tier 5+ blue and yellow zones increased to match Tier 3 and 4 blue zones
Avalonian Raid bosses are now immune to silence effects
Tier 1 equipment and Carrot Soup can now be sold at the Tutorial Marketplace in the Cove
In Streamer Mode, region names are now hidden in region queues
Cooldown for /whisper, /faction, and /factionlocal chat reduced to 0.5 seconds
Trading in Corrupted Dungeons has been disabled
Journal missions 'Get 150,000 Infamy in Corrupted Dungeons' and above have had their rewards reduced
sections.searchable_text: Changes Depths level duration ghostly animation death reenter Vanity Merchant tabs Victory Emotes Adventurer Tokens Community Tokens Avatars Avatar Rings Hunter Corrupted Dungeons bosses minibosses Tier 5 blue yellow zones tracks Avalonian Raid bosses silence Tutorial Marketplace Streamer Mode region queues whisper faction factionlocal chat Corrupted Dungeons trading disabled Infamy rewards

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch are published separately (thread 215205).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed resource filters not working correctly in the Bank Overview
Fixed issue where changing regions with an overcharged item equipped would cause health to display its base value
Fixed rare issue in the Depths where two teams could spawn in the same location
sections.searchable_text: Fixes resource filters Bank Overview overcharged item health base value Depths two teams spawn same location
